summary: Completed testing of Cash Operations page (Operatiuni Casa) - Backend APIs and Frontend UI. All 34 backend tests passed (16 existing + 18 new cash operations tests). Frontend renders correctly with expected 'disconnected' state for bridge service.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/settings/fiscal returns default fiscal settings (bridge_url, fiscal_mode, auto_print)
Backend: POST /api/settings/fiscal saves and returns fiscal settings (admin only, casier gets 403)
Backend: GET /api/cash-operations/daily-stats returns daily statistics (totalCash, totalCard, totalVoucher, cashIn, cashOut, receiptsCount)
Backend: GET /api/cash-operations/history returns operations history list
Backend: GET /api/cash-operations/history supports date filtering
Backend: POST /api/cash-operations creates CASH_IN operation record
Backend: POST /api/cash-operations creates CASH_OUT operation record
Backend: POST /api/cash-operations creates REPORT_X operation record
Backend: POST /api/cash-operations creates REPORT_Z operation record
Backend: POST /api/sales/{id}/cancel returns 404 for non-existing sale
Backend: All cash operations endpoints require authentication (401 without token)
Frontend: CashOperationsPage renders correctly with data-testid='cash-operations-page'
Frontend: Bridge status indicator shows 'Casa deconectata' (expected - bridge not running in test env)
Frontend: Alert with instructions appears when bridge is disconnected
Frontend: Statistics cards display correctly (Sold Casa, Incasari Cash, Incasari Card, Bonuri Azi)
Frontend: Bridge settings dialog opens with URL input and Save button
Frontend: Bridge settings dialog allows changing bridge URL
Frontend: History dialog opens and shows operations list (including TEST_ operations from API tests)
Frontend: Report X button shows toast error 'Bridge-ul nu este conectat!' when clicked without bridge
Frontend: Cash In/Cash Out/Report Z buttons correctly disabled when bridge disconnected (by design)
seed_data_creation: Created test cash operations (CASH_IN, CASH_OUT, REPORT_X, REPORT_Z) with TEST_ prefix during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cash Operations page fully tested. Bridge service (fiscal_bridge.py) runs on user's local PC - localhost:5555 calls will fail in cloud environment (expected). The page correctly shows 'Casa deconectata' state and displays instructional alert. Cash In/Cash Out/Report Z dialogs only open when bridge is connected (by design). History dialog always accessible and shows operations from DB. All backend endpoints working: /api/settings/fiscal (GET/POST), /api/cash-operations/daily-stats (GET), /api/cash-operations/history (GET), /api/cash-operations (POST), /api/sales/{id}/cancel (POST - 404 for non-existing).

notes.bridge_service: The fiscal bridge service (fiscal_bridge.py) runs locally on the store PC, not in cloud. This is expected behavior - the UI correctly shows disconnected state.
notes.dialog_behavior: Cash In, Cash Out, and Report Z dialogs are intentionally blocked when bridge is disconnected - this is correct UX to prevent users from attempting fiscal operations without a connected printer.
